lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in good condition. It is mechanically sound with minor wear. The exterior and interior show some light signs of use but are well-maintained.
This vehicle is in poor condition. It requires significant mechanical repairs and shows heavy wear on the interior and exterior. It is not in reliable running order.

This vehicle is in absolute mint condition, appearing and driving as if it just left the showroom floor. It has been meticulously maintained with a full service history and has always been garage-kept, preserving its flawless original paint and pristine interior. There are no mechanical issues, cosmetic blemishes, or signs of wear whatsoever. Every feature, from the engine performance to the electronic systems, functions perfectly. This is an exceptional example of the model, offering a like-new experience for the most discerning buyer.
Mint condition.

This vehicle is in pristine, showroom condition and has been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled environment. The exterior paint is absolutely flawless, showing no swirls, chips, or imperfections, while the interior is spotless and looks as if it has never been sat in. Mechanically, the car is in perfect working order with a comprehensive service history and all original components functioning like new. This is a rare opportunity to own a collector-grade example that truly represents the pinnacle of its model's condition.

Get ready to hit the road in a vehicle that perfectly blends reliability and comfort! This car is in good condition and has been well-cared for, offering a smooth ride and dependable performance for its next owner. While it shows some minor, expected signs of wear, it remains a fantastic and solid choice for anyone seeking a quality vehicle at a great price!

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents an exceptional opportunity for the discerning driver. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, it offers a refined driving experience that balances performance with enduring value. Thoroughly inspected to ensure reliable operation, this unit stands as a testament to quality engineering and responsible ownership.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty car, and it’s been such a joy to drive. It's in really solid shape and has plenty of life left in it for its next owner! Whether you're zooming around town or heading out on a road trip, this beauty handles like a dream. Everything works just as it should, and I’ve taken really nice care of it over the years. Come take it for a spin—I'm sure you're going to love how it feels on the road!

This E92 M3 is a mechanically sound example of the final naturally aspirated V8 era. Powered by the high-revving S65B40 engine, it features eight individual throttle bodies and a 8,400 RPM redline. Power is delivered via a 6-speed manual transmission to a Variable M Differential Lock for optimal corner-exit traction. This unit has undergone critical preventative maintenance, including rod bearing replacement with VAC treated shells and new throttle actuators. The chassis retains its composure via Electronic Damper Control (EDC) and remains stiff with the factory
Used car. Good condition. Reliable engine. Clean interior. Minor exterior wear. Title in hand.

This well-maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury and daily reliability. The exterior retains a deep, glossy finish with only minor road wear consistent with careful ownership. Inside, the cabin is smoke-free and features premium upholstery that remains supple and supportive. All electronics, from the intuitive infotainment system to the dual-zone climate control, function exactly as intended. Mechanically, the car is sound; it has been serviced regularly, with recent fluid changes and a fresh set of tires ensuring a smooth, confident ride. It’s a turn-key example ready for its next owner to enjoy immediately.

Presented in commendable condition, this vehicle exemplifies a rigorous standard of maintenance and consistent care. It offers a sophisticated driving experience, balancing robust mechanical performance with a well-preserved aesthetic. A premier choice for the discerning driver seeking both reliability and distinction, this automobile has been thoroughly vetted to ensure it meets our authoritative criteria for quality and long-term value.

Presenting a distinguished vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic refinement. This model has been maintained to a rigorous standard, ensuring a reliable and sophisticated driving experience. With its well-preserved interior and robust performance profile, this offering represents a premier choice for the discerning buyer seeking exceptional value in a pre-owned luxury asset.

Hey there! Are you looking for a reliable ride that’s ready for your next adventure? I’m selling my trusty car, and it’s been such a joy to drive! It’s in solid shape and has been really well-loved, so it's ready for you to just hop in and hit the road. It’s the perfect blend of comfort and dependability without that brand-new price tag. I'd love for it to go to a great home, so come take it for a spin—you’re going to love how it handles!

This E46 M3 is powered by the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six engine, featuring six individual throttle bodies and a Double-VANOS variable valve timing system for optimized torque across the power band. Power is delivered through a Getrag 420G 6-speed manual gearbox to the rear wheels via a torque-sensing M-Variable Differential Lock. The chassis has been maintained with a focus on structural integrity, including a reinforced rear subframe and refreshed bushings to preserve its legendary handling dynamics. Recent preventative maintenance includes a comprehensive top-end inspection and cooling system overhaul. This example presents in strong mechanical health, offering a visceral driving experience with precise steering rack feedback and a linear power delivery that remains a benchmark for naturally aspirated performance.
Reliable daily driver. Well-maintained engine. Interior is clean. Minor cosmetic scratches only.

This vehicle strikes the perfect balance between daily utility and refined comfort, presenting in well-maintained condition throughout. The exterior maintains a lustrous finish with only minor road-wear consistent with its history, while the alloy wheels remain in excellent shape. Inside, you'll find a smoke-free cabin featuring premium upholstery that has been meticulously cared for—no significant stains or tears to be found. Every button, dial, and digital display functions exactly as intended, including the responsive infotainment system and dual-zone climate control. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly, benefiting from a rigorous maintenance schedule with recent oil and filter changes on record. The transmission shifts seamlessly, and the brakes provide firm, confident stopping power. This car has been a reliable companion and is ready for its next owner to drive away with total peace of mind.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Presenting in commendable condition, it offers a sophisticated driving experience backed by a history of consistent care and mechanical integrity. With its refined aesthetic and proven performance, this model remains an exceptional value proposition for those who demand both reliability and prestige in their next automotive investment.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, which exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. Having undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection, this unit offers a refined driving experience and consistent performance. This offering represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a dependable asset that balances superior functionality with exceptional value.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s been such a fantastic car. It’s in really solid shape and has clearly been well-loved over the years. It drives super smoothly, looks great, and is totally ready for its next big adventure with you! If you're looking for something dependable and fun to drive without the brand-new price tag, you've definitely found it. Come take it for a spin—you're going to love it!

This E46 M3 represents a superb example of BMW’s M-Division engineering, powered by the high-revving S54B32 inline-six featuring individual throttle bodies and a dual-VANOS variable valve timing system. The powertrain is mated to a precise Getrag 420G six-speed manual gearbox, delivering power through a factory limited-slip differential. To ensure long-term durability, the rear subframe has been proactively reinforced, and the rod bearings have been serviced to maintain peak internal tolerances. The suspension retains its firm, communicative geometry, providing the sharp turn-in and neutral balance characteristic of this chassis. While showing honest signs of use, the mechanical components are robust, and the throttle response remains visceral, offering a pure analog driving experience that modern sports cars struggle to replicate.
Used car. Good condition. Reliable performance. Clean interior. No mechanical issues.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a perfect balance of performance and reliability for the discerning driver. The exterior retains a deep, glossy finish with only minor, age-appropriate blemishes that do not detract from its impressive curb appeal. Inside, the cabin is a smoke-free environment featuring well-preserved upholstery, intuitive controls, and a suite of fully functional electronics. Mechanically, the car is in robust health, benefiting from a documented history of regular oil changes and preventative maintenance. With a smooth-shifting transmission and responsive handling, this car delivers a confident driving experience that reflects years of dedicated care. It is a turn-key example ready for its next chapter.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Featuring a robust powertrain and a refined interior, the automobile has been preserved to an exacting standard, ensuring both mechanical reliability and aesthetic appeal. A comprehensive inspection confirms its readiness for immediate acquisition. Experience the perfect synthesis of performance and value.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Exhibiting consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, it delivers a refined driving experience that balances performance with enduring value. Thoroughly inspected to ensure operational reliability, this unit stands as a testament to responsible ownership and remains in commendable condition.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been super reliable for me. If you’re looking for a dependable car that still looks great on the road, this is the one! I've taken good care of it, and it’s ready for some new adventures. Feel free to reach out with any questions—I’d love to see it go to a good home!

This E46 M3 is a driver-focused example featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six engine with its signature individual throttle bodies and double-VANOS variable valve timing. Power is delivered to the rear wheels via a crisp 6-speed manual transmission and a factory M-variable limited-slip differential. The chassis remains composed with solid subframe mounts and responsive damping. Well-maintained and mechanically sound, this vehicle offers the tactile steering feedback and linear power delivery that defines the era. It shows light cosmetic wear consistent with its age but remains a performance-ready machine with excellent engine compression and a clean rev range.
2019 SUV. Clean title. Runs well. Minor cosmetic scratches on rear bumper. Interior well-maintained. New brake pads. Reliable daily driver.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury and daily utility. The exterior features a lustrous finish with only minor road-wear consistent with careful use, while the alloy wheels remain in excellent shape. Inside, the cabin is clean and smoke-free, boasting supple leather seating and a fully functional infotainment suite. Under the hood, the engine runs smooth and quiet, backed by a comprehensive service history and recent oil change. It drives straight, brakes firmly, and offers a comfortable, rattle-free experience. Whether you're commuting or heading out on a road trip, this car is turn-key ready for its next owner.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, this model offers a balanced synthesis of performance and reliability. It has undergone a rigorous inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for road-ready excellence. An exceptional value proposition for those seeking quality and long-term utility.
